regime_fall.current_status: Military escalation has intensified dramatically with a third US carrier en route, confirmed Iranian coordination with Iraqi militias, threats to critical maritime chokepoints, and explicit Iranian rejection of scheduled diplomatic talks in Islamabad, while internal IRGC leadership restructuring and hardliner consolidation continue amid persistent economic blockade and growing US domestic war fatigue.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Supreme Leader Khamenei appointed Major General Amir Hatami as overall Artesh commander, signaling significant military leadership restructuring amid ongoing escalation and internal power dynamics.
